narrative_beat: Mao senatorial carimba selo de cera sobre documento oficial — Congresso forca o Pentagono

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an elderly masculine hand pressing a heavy red wax seal stamp onto an official document bearing a stylized eagle crest
subject.focal_point: the glowing red wax spreading under the seal, cracked at the edges
subject.secondary: Hand wears an opaque gold senator ring. Document corner visible with ornate engraved eagle emblem, no readable text.

environment.location: empty curved congressional plenary bench chamber
environment.time_of_day: late night session, interior amber light

composition.foreground: hand and wax seal in rich crimson and gold tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white curved plenary bench in deep shadow

lighting.key_light: warm chandelier light from above-left cutting the hand in high contrast
lighting.rim_light: gold rim on knuckles and wax

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
